generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom who cares about our community's safety, I've been really concerned about how our current defense policies are leaving us vulnerable. Did you know that our allies are actually benefiting more from our security investments than we are? It's not fair that we're bearing so much of the burden while others free-ride. We need to focus on making sure our own families are protected first. #StrongerAtHome #FairBurdenSharing
